title: loxogramme iridifolia
intro: Loxogramme iridifolia is a type of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae, commonly known as the iridogram fern. It is native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Loxogramme iridifolia include reducing fever, relieving coughs, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Loxogramme iridifolia is often prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction by steeping the dried leaves and stems in hot water, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
